mean_en: all the people who were born at about the same time;  the average time in which children grow up, become adults and have children of their own, (usually considered to be about 30 years)
sentence: Several generations of this mobile phone have been developed.
sentence_trans: 这个手机已经经历了很多代的发展。
word_etyma: generate 产生，发生 + ion表名词 → 产生出的一代人 → generation一代；一代人
